global.description: The ad features a blue background with various shapes and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting travel booking services at a low price.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background occupying the top portion of the ad.

elements.label: Large circular and rectangular shapes
elements.description: A large circle and a rectangle in the center, both outlined and filled with a lighter shade of blue.

elements.label: Medium rectangular shape
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangle in the center, outlined and positioned slightly above the larger shapes.

elements.label: Another large circular shape
elements.description: A large circle in the center, overlapping with other shapes, outlined and filled with a lighter shade.

elements.label: Small shape
elements.description: A small shape positioned lower in the center, with an unclear visual representation.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text at the bottom, stating 'Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap €9.99 Shop now'.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap €9.99 Shop now

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A stylized logo text 'CloudRoute' in white, positioned at the top left.
